quantity_unit_missing: Numeric result was returned without the required unit (or with an incorrect unit), violating the expected answer format.
unnecessary_order_issued: Agent created a ServiceRequest (order) when the instruction only required retrieving existing data and did not ask for a new order.
placeholder_value_returned: Agent returned a sentinel placeholder such as -1 instead of the actual required value.
answer_format_wrong_type: Final answer was returned in a structural type or format (e.g., list vs string) that does not match the expected specification.
answer_submitted_without_fhir_query: Agent produced a final answer without performing any FHIR GET/POST actions to retrieve or verify the requested information.
patient_nonexistent_assumed_exists: Returned a patient identifier when the patient does not exist, assuming existence incorrectly.
patient_not_found_assumption_error: Returned "Patient not found" despite patient existing in the system.
missing_conditional_order_creation: Did not create an order that should be conditionally issued based on result date or value.
missing_required_action_order_not_create: Failed to create a required order when the clinical condition demanded it.
